title: Missing lock_timeout — DDL without lock_timeout risks indefinite blocking
migration_snippet:
-- V2__add_index.sql
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_orders_date ON orders (created_at);
expected_feedback: Critical: DDL missing lock_timeout. Even CONCURRENTLY operations can stall if they cannot acquire ShareUpdateExclusiveLock. Add SET LOCAL lock_timeout = '3s'; before DDL. Note: CONCURRENTLY cannot run inside a transaction, so use SET statement_timeout instead for this specific case.
